text.title: Experiment Hypothesis Scoring Procedure
text.summary: 5-step weekly procedure to score hypotheses + publish a sortable queue.

step.name: pick-rubric
step.input: This cycle's frozen rubric (ICE / PIE / RICE) + behavioural anchors
step.action: Confirm rubric_version + cycle_id. If mid-cycle edit requested, defer to next cycle.
step.decision-gate: Mid-cycle edit blocks: STOP and queue for next cycle.

step.name: score-each-hypothesis
step.action: For each hypothesis, assign band per axis with evidence ≥ 10 chars referencing a specific quote/ticket/dashboard.

step.name: calibrate-with-second-rater
step.input: scored hypotheses from rater 1 + second rater
step.action: Rater 2 scores independently. Compare; if discrepancy > 1 band on any axis, run a third pass with discussion.
step.decision-gate: If discrepancy > 1 band, do not queue until resolved.

step.name: apply-entry-threshold
step.action: Set queued=true only when projected_lift_pct ≥ 5 AND confidence.band ≥ 3. Others recorded but not queued.

step.name: publish-and-freeze
step.action: Publish queue to experiment-ledger. Lock rubric for the cycle.
